headlines.title: US-Iran Deal: Trump says not to rush as details emerge of potential agreement to end war and reopen Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Regional officials say the US is close to a deal with Iran that would include a 60-day ceasefire extension and reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices have slid on hopes of a peace deal.

headlines.title: Trump asks Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Pakistan, Egypt, Jordan and Turkey to join Abraham Accords with Israel
headlines.summary: US President Trump is pushing for mass normalization of relations between Israel and multiple Muslim-majority nations as part of broader regional agreement.

headlines.title: Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda outpacing response efforts, WHO warns
headlines.summary: The head of WHO reports the fast-moving Ebola outbreak has reached 220 suspected deaths. Young men stormed a Congo hospital treating Ebola patients to demand bodies of their kin.

headlines.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
headlines.summary: Russia confirmed using a hypersonic missile, reportedly traveling over 10 times the speed of sound, in the attack.

headlines.title: Suicide bombing on train in southwestern Pakistan kills more than 30 people
headlines.summary: The attack was claimed by separatist Balochistan militants, marking the latest violence in the region.

headlines.title: First Hong Kong astronaut launches into space onboard Chinese mission
headlines.summary: A 43-year-old police officer and mother of three serves as the team's payload scientist on the Chinese space mission.

headlines.title: China's deadliest coal mining disaster in years sparks anger and calls for justice
headlines.summary: On China's tightly-controlled internet, people are questioning how the disaster happened and demanding accountability.

headlines.title: Latvian opposition aims to form four-party majority government after coalition collapse
headlines.summary: The ruling coalition collapsed this month over national security concerns, and opposition lawmaker Andris Kulbergs is working to form a new government.

headlines.title: At least 19 hospitalized after 'strong smell' reported at Tokyo luxury mall
headlines.summary: Police say a man sprayed a substance at an ATM in the Ginza 6 shopping centre.

headlines.title: Israeli airstrike on tent in southern Gaza kills two including six-year-old girl
headlines.summary: Palestinian health officials reported 17 others wounded, including children.
